case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS POWELL, PAMELA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-14-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-14-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1238. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONT'D FOR 6 MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL PAID OFF AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-14-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-15-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 NO APPEARANCES. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,238.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, PAMELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-16-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-16-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PROGRESS REPORT.
